title: BPSSC Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 22 Assistant Sub- Inspector Posts
description: The Bihar Police Sub-Inspector Services Commission (BPSSC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 22 Assistant Sub- Inspector Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Diploma in Electronics and Electrical Engineering can apply for the BPSSC Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode.
